_meta.name: C9 — Zero-3 / FSDP hexa native (CLM 7B parameter sharding)
_meta.decision_record: feedback_ai_native_clm — no PyTorch FSDP / DeepSpeed; pure hexa-native

design.shard_strategy: contiguous layer ranges per rank — rank r owns layers [NL*r/world, NL*(r+1)/world)
design.shared_param_owner: rank 0 (embed, lmh_U, lmh_V — small relative to 7B layer stack at VOCAB=256)
design.optimizer_shard: AdamW m/v moments allocated only for owned layers + shared params on rank 0

comm_pattern.forward: all_gather: owner broadcasts the layer's 8 tensors before each layer fwd; non-owners free temporary buffers after
comm_pattern.backward: reduce_scatter: every rank's local grad is summed across ranks, result lives only on the owner
comm_pattern.loss_log: all_reduce on the scalar loss for consistent cross-rank logging

checkpoint.format: HEXACKPT-v1 + __FSDP__ descriptor line + tensor sections (compatible with existing gpu_train.hexa loader)

nccl_status.real_binding_target: $HEXA_LANG/lib/hxnccl/ — TODO: 5 extern fn bindings (ncclCommInitRank, ncclBroadcast, ncclReduceScatter, ncclAllReduce, ncclCommDestroy)
nccl_status.rationale: C9 budget = 4h. NCCL FFI library compile + cross-host link is a one-day follow-up once H100×2 pod is allocated. Single-rank correctness + complete API + design unblock A1_clm 7B prep today.

T1_init_layout.description: begin/end/owner invariants for every (NL, world_size) pair

T2_single_rank_noop.description: world_size=1 pure-CPU helpers + NCCL stub all short-circuit to OK

T3_ckpt_header_roundtrip.description: fsdp_header_line + fsdp_shard_path are byte-stable across hexa builds; file write→read→parse is bit-identical
T3_ckpt_header_roundtrip.single_rank_header: __FSDP__ rank=0 world=1 layer_begin=0 layer_end=32 has_shared=1 NL=32
T3_ckpt_header_roundtrip.two_rank_r1_header: __FSDP__ rank=1 world=2 layer_begin=16 layer_end=32 has_shared=0 NL=32

memory_footprint_estimate.param_bytes_total_unsharded: 32 * ~201 MB + shared ≈ 6.4 GB params (matches 7B fp32 ~14 GB total when grads + AdamW are added)
memory_footprint_estimate.note: Embed (1 MB at VOCAB=256) lives on rank 0 only — negligible; for VOCAB=32K this becomes 512 MB and we may want to shard embed too in a follow-up.

multi_rank_todo.summary: Multi-rank path is fully designed and stubbed — the only missing piece is the libhxnccl.so binding layer.

items.description: Create $HEXA_LANG/lib/hxnccl/ with @extern fn bindings to libnccl.so
items.blocked_on: H100 pod with NCCL installed (RunPod default image already has it)

items.description: Wire training/nccl_ffi.hexa stubs to call the @extern fns from C9-MR-1
Replace fsdp_all_gather_params multi-rank branch with real ncclBroadcast (8 tensors per layer)
items.tested_via: extend test_fsdp_shard.hexa with a 2-rank simulation under MPI_LOCALRANK env

items.description: Replace fsdp_reduce_scatter_grads multi-rank branch with real ncclReduceScatter
Wire fsdp_init/fsdp_save_ckpt into train_clm_gpu.hexa under env CLM_FSDP=1 (gated rollout)
items.rollout_plan: 1) world=1 smoke on H100 (must be byte-identical to non-FSDP run), 2) world=2 7B fwd-only test, 3) world=2 7B full step + ckpt

items.description: Multi-rank shard checkpoint loader (read .rank{r}of{w} files and assemble FsdpState)
items.note: Existing single-rank loader can be reused for the world=1 case verbatim

multi_rank_todo.total_effort_days: 2-3 days (1 day H100 setup + 1 day wiring + 1 day soak)

non_overlapping_with_other_agents.C2_layer_fused_ffi: FFI batching at the GEMM level — orthogonal to FSDP layer sharding
non_overlapping_with_other_agents.C3_pbv_leak: stage0 PBV leak fix — orthogonal; FSDP module uses fresh structs (no list aliasing)
non_overlapping_with_other_agents.C8_flash_attention: intra-layer attention kernel — orthogonal to FSDP inter-layer sharding

summary: C9 single-rank FSDP path complete and verified — 34/34 test assertions PASS on darwin arm64 (no CUDA). API/struct surface ready for multi-rank wiring; NCCL FFI stubbed at 5 functions with NCCL_TODO_RC=99 sentinel so any silent desync is impossible. Module + test + JSON state landed without touching anima/core/* (L0 freeze respected) or any .py/.rs/.sh file (HEXA-FIRST respected).
